subject: docs(todo): drop 8 items resolved in this push
body:
Cleared after shipping:
- Features: Storage usage indicator, code-split ApexCharts,
  transaction deletion from import review
- UX: `text-base-content/40` systematic audit (12 body/helper sites
  bumped to /60; 18 icon / hover-resting sites kept at /40)
- Performance: Debounce cash-on-hand → runway recompute
- Testing: useDialogA11y stack tests, isTransactionDirty tests
- Internationalization (deferred): ApexCharts date formatters now
  use toLocaleDateString(undefined, …); section removed

Remaining backlog: 9 items across Features (2), UX (3), Performance
(1), Technical (5).

Tags: docs, todo, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: patch
